| =elot-db-file= | ="~/.emacs.d/elot-cache.sqlite"= | =elot= | Path to the SQLite file backing the ELOT global-slurp cache. |
| =elot-default-image-path= | ="./images/"= | =elot= | ELOT default output directory for generated images. |
| =elot-exporter-jar-path= | ="c:/Users/jowik/bin/elot-exporter.jar"= | =elot= | Path to the elot-exporter.jar file. |
| =elot-flymake-checkers= | =(elot/nodeclare-id-prefix-label elot/ontology-header elot/prefix-table elot/ontology-presence elot/required-sections elot/description-list-curies elot/axiom-value-curies elot/omn-syntax)= | =elot= | List of `org-lint' checker names to run via Flymake. |
| =elot-global-label-display-eldoc= | =t= | =elot= | Whether `elot-global-label-display-mode' registers an eldoc backend. |
| =elot-global-label-display-max-ids= | =10000= | =elot= | Soft cap on the number of ids fed to `regexp-opt' by the global mode. |
| =elot-global-label-display-mode-hook= | =nil= | =elot= | Hook run after entering or leaving `elot-global-label-display-mode'. |
| =elot-global-label-display-show-source= | =t= | =elot= | Whether the eldoc/hover summary carries a provenance marker. |
| =elot-label-display-face= | =elot-label-face= | =elot= | Customizable face used for ELOT label fontification. |
| =elot-label-display-size-threshold= | =512000= | =elot= | Buffer size (bytes) above which `elot-mode' asks before enabling label-display. |
| =elot-label-lookup-scope= | =both= | =elot= | Which label sources `elot-label-lookup' consults. |
| =elot-mode-auto-detect= | =t= | =elot= | When non-nil, automatically enable `elot-mode' in ELOT buffers. |
| =elot-mode-hook= | =nil= | =elot= | Hook run after entering or leaving `elot-mode'. |
| =elot-preferred-languages= | =nil= | =elot= | Ordered list of preferred language tags for labels and annotations. |
| =elot-rdfpuml-command-str= | ="rdfpuml"= | =elot= | Command to execute `rdfpuml'. |
| =elot-rdfpuml-options= | ="hide empty members
  hide circle
  skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0"= | =elot= | Default options for rdfpuml. |
| =elot-rdfpuml-path= | ="c:/Users/jowik/bin/rdf2rml/bin/rdfpuml.pl"= | =elot= | Path to the rdfpuml Perl program. |
| =elot-robot-jar-path= | ="c:/Users/jowik/bin/robot.jar"= | =elot= | Path to the robot.jar file. |
| =elot-source-rq-cache-dir-name= | =".elot-cache"= | =elot= | Directory name (relative to the project root) for cached .rq results. |
| =elot-source-supported-extensions= | =(("org" . elot-source-parse-org) ("csv" . elot-source-parse-csv) ("tsv" . elot-source-parse-tsv) ("json" . elot-source-parse-json) ("ttl" . elot-source-parse-ttl) ("rq" . elot-source-parse-rq))= | =elot= | Alist mapping source file extensions to parser functions. |
| =elot-source-ttl-label-query= | ="PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?id ?label (LANG(?label) AS ?lang) WHERE {
  ?id rdfs:label ?label .
}"= | =elot= | SPARQL query used by `elot-source-parse-ttl' to extract id/label pairs. |
| =elot-toggle-labels-key= | =nil= | =elot= | Key sequence bound to `elot-toggle-label-display' in ELOT-relevant buffers. |
